summary: FIDEM Iteration 4 (Viral + Monetization + Responsive) fully verified end-to-end. Backend: 66/66 pytest passing — 49 regression tests still green + 17 new iter4 tests in test_z_iteration4.py covering Daily check-in (status, claim+50 UZS, second-claim 400, streak persisted), Boost (status, 402 on no balance, activate -5000 + boost_until set), Spotlight (activate -25000 + spotlight_until set), Candidate ranking (boosted user B floats to top of A's match feed), Quiz (7 questions, submit +100 UZS bonus, identical-answers match bonus appends 'Quiz mosligi' reason), Icebreakers (uz/ru/en/default 10 strings each), Invites (status with code/link/invited/redeemed/available/next_milestone, redeem 400 when not eligible). Frontend live verification at 1440x900 + 414x896: admin login → daily-checkin dialog auto-opens; clicking daily-claim shows toast '+50 so'm · 1 kun ketma-ket' and closes dialog (streak became 1 kun, balance 50 so'm). Sidebar visible on desktop with nav (Nomzodlar/Xabarlar/Saqlanganlar/Quiz/Men/Premium/Boost & Spotlight/Bildirishnomalar/Admin Panel) + user mini-card; BottomNav hidden md+. Mobile reverse confirmed. /quiz renders 7 questions (quiz-q-0..6) with quiz-submit. /boost shows card-boost + card-spotlight with prices (5,000 / 25,000 so'm) and 4 CTAs (buy-boost-balance, buy-spotlight-balance, buy-boost-click, buy-spotlight-click). /me shows daily-strip (streak progress), invite-card with 0/3 progress + invite-share Telegram CTA, link-boost. Candidate cards grid responsive 19 cards; Spotlight badge visible on top users.

minor.issue: Carry-over: In-memory rate-limit bucket per-IP is shared across test runs and across login/register. When iter3's rate-limit test runs first, subsequent iter4 setup (register) hits 429 from same IP. Mitigated by naming iter4 file 'test_z_iteration4.py' so it runs BEFORE 'test_zz_iteration3.py' alphabetically — full suite 66/66 now green.

Spec said {active, until, price} — implementation returns those keys ✓. But /spotlight has no GET status endpoint analogous to /boost/status; clients must read 'spotlight_until' from /auth/me. Minor — consider adding /spotlight/status for symmetry.
Two separate DB writes ($set then $inc). Could be one update_one with $set+$inc to be atomic. Functional but non-ideal.
Field 'next_bonus' returned but spec also implies streak_7_bonus_in. The implementation adds this extra key — frontend should handle gracefully (no break observed).

issues: 'Balans bilan (50)' button label seems to show current balance in parens — but balance is only 50 so'm while cost is 5,000. Clicking will fail with 402. Consider disabling the CTA + showing 'Need 5,000 so'm' hint when balance < price (currently the click is just an UX dead-end). Same for Spotlight.

action_items: (UX) On /boost, disable 'Balans bilan' CTA when user balance < price and show 'Yetarli emas — CLICK orqali to'lash' hint. Currently the button is enabled, click→402→silent fail.
(Minor BE) Make /quiz/submit a single update_one ($set + $inc) for atomicity.
(Minor BE) Add GET /api/spotlight/status for symmetry with /boost/status.
(Carry-over from iter3) Add Content-Length pre-check on /files/upload before reading body.
critical_code_review_comments: growth_r.py is 299 lines and well-organized by feature. Pricing constants centralized (BOOST_PRICE/SPOTLIGHT_PRICE/DAILY_BONUS/STREAK_7_BONUS/INVITE_REWARD_GIVES_PREMIUM_DAYS). Good.
Daily streak math is correct: yesterday check uses iso-date string compare which is sound because iso() truncates to date midnight here.

Candidates sort with boost/spotlight: builds an O(n) lookup inside key fn via 'next(...)' which is O(n²). Acceptable for 500 docs (~250k ops) but flag for scale-up — better to attach the original doc fields into 'pub' before sort.
Quiz match bonus only appends reason when bonus>=5 — correct guard; reasons.append('Quiz mosligi (+N)') matches spec.
/invites/status lazily writes referral_code on first call — safe but causes a DB write on every uncoded user's GET; consider writing at registration instead.
Spotlight has no GET /spotlight/status endpoint — asymmetric with boost. Clients work around via /auth/me.
All new growth endpoints require Depends(get_current_user_id) — auth-protected correctly.
Sidebar.jsx + Layout.jsx responsive verified: md:pl-64 lg:pl-72 content shift works, BottomNav md:hidden, Sidebar hidden md:flex.
seed_data_creation: Tests register transient i4+a_<run> and i4+b_<run> users via /auth/register + /profile/onboard. No cleanup (matches iter3 pattern).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run order matters: keep test_z_iteration4.py BEFORE test_zz_iteration3.py alphabetically — iter3's rate-limit test burns the per-IP login bucket for 5 min, which would 429 iter4's fixture registrations. To unblock playwright UI testing after a fresh pytest run, restart backend (`sudo supervisorctl restart backend`) to clear the in-memory RateLimiter. WS URL is wss://serious-dating-8.preview.emergentagent.com/api/ws?token=<jwt>. Frontend JWT at localStorage.fidem_token.
rca of the issue: No bugs. Initial UI test failed with 429 because iter3 rate-limit test had just been run, exhausting the login bucket for this IP. Mitigation: restart backend to clear in-memory RateLimiter, then UI testing passed fully.
